definition.summary: Treasury is not one single authoritative artifact in this repo. It appears as 8888 Gaolaozhuang minimal treasury contract, 18888 Lingxiao Divine Treasury/Deity Bank, and the V7.5.2 Galactic Bank institutional bank role. These are kept distinct below.

source_verified_role.header: 高老莊 8888｜凡間流通池 / 商店紅利池（最小可用金庫）
purpose: Safely receive KGEN as mortal/shop bonus pool
state: treasuryWallet defaulting to owner when constructor wallet is zero

receives_from.details: FEE_BPS_TOTAL = 500; FEE_BPS_TREASURY = 100; placeOrder transfers feeToTreasury to treasury8888 after requiring treasury8888 != address(0).

source_verified_role.header: 18888｜靈霄寶殿・玉帝神明銀行（Deity Bank）
concept_refs: neural/CIVILIZATION_GRAPH.json role: Divine Treasury / Civilization Mass
core_rules: Monthly UTC day 5 payday window via external finalizeMonthWithAmount
Early withdrawal penalty split to brain11520 / heart12345 / publicGood when configured
Can receive KGEN Token 0.1% tax flow

galactic_bank_institutional_treasury.name: Galactic Bank

contract_behavior: Receives native token via receive() and emits DepositNative
depositToken(address,uint256) transfers ERC20 into the bank and emits DepositToken
docs_role: KGEN/README.md names 五指山系統（銀行）：Galactic Bank
KGEN/contracts/README.md defines Bank as Galactic Bank（五指山制度中樞）
KGEN whitepaper says Galactic Bank is a制度銀行, not a lockbox, for reflux, construction, distribution, and governance
KGEN/timeline/500Y_Epoch.md says 500Y Epoch is not a time/fund lock and Galactic Bank supports reflux, construction, reward, distribution, and transparent on-chain records

galactic_bank_institutional_treasury.species_mapping_note: Galactic Bank is a V7.5.2 core-triad contract, not species 8888 or species 18888 in the current civilization indices.

version_verification.rule: 不可只靠檔名判斷版本
checked_sources: Solidity inline banners and contract declarations
Solidity pragma and public state/function/event declarations
KGEN/README.md on-chain address and role sections
KGEN/contracts/README.md core triad and version strategy
evidence_notes: 8888 version and role are verified from the Treasury contract banner, contract declaration, state/functions, and cross-index references; not from filename alone.
16888 fee routing is verified from the Universe contract header comments, constants, treasury8888 state, SetTreasury event, constructor, setTreasury, and placeOrder transfer behavior.
18888 role is verified from Lingxiao contract comments/declaration plus graph and dedicated 18888 index, not from portal label alone.
Galactic Bank role is verified from contract behavior and KGEN README/contracts README/whitepaper/timeline docs.

portal_display_conflicts.conflict: Portal shows a Bank 18888 address, but KGEN/README.md does not document a Lingxiao/18888 deployment. Existing indices mark this as ambiguous and possibly Galactic Bank display.
Portal registers 8888 as soon/click-disabled while repo contains a source-only 8888 Treasury contract and 16888 fee route.

active_gaps.note: 8888 has no K線西遊記/temples/8888 folder or dedicated frontend entry in this repo.
8888 is present in SPECIES_TREE as CONTRACT_ONLY and in whitepaper concept layers, but absent from neural/CIVILIZATION_GRAPH.json.
No deployed address for KGEN_8888_Treasury_V1_0_0 is documented in KGEN/README.md.
Galactic Bank is a V7.5.2 core-triad contract in KGEN docs, but no deployed address is listed in KGEN/README.md.

Treasury can refer to 8888 minimal treasury, 18888 Divine Treasury/Deity Bank, publicGood treasury fields, Brain/Mars configurable treasury fields, or Galactic Bank institutional bank. Do not collapse these into one address or version.
